name: Black Beans & Rice (Genie)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sort and wash the beans.
2. Combine beans, green pepper, and 1/2 cup chopped onion in a large Dutch oven.
3. Cover with 6 cups water and soak overnight.
4. Add remaining 4 cups water to the Dutch oven; cover and bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and simmer for 2 1/2 hours or until beans are tender.
6. Combine the remaining 1/2 cup onion, garlic, oregano, and cumin in a small bowl. Mash the mixture using a fork.
7. Stir in vinegar. Add the vinegar mixture and salt to the beans.
8. Simmer, uncovered, for an additional 20 minutes.
9. Serve over hot cooked rice.
